    53	        branchSidebar    branchsidebar.Model
    54	        notificationView notificationview.Model
    55	        currSectionId    int
    56	        footer           footer.Model
    57	        repo             section.Section
    58	        prs              []section.Section
    59	        issues           []section.Section
    60	        notifications    []section.Section
    61	        tabs             tabs.Model
    62	        ctx              *context.ProgramContext
    63	        taskSpinner      spinner.Model
    64	        tasks            map[string]context.Task
    65	}
    66	
    67	func NewModel(location config.Location) Model {
    68	        taskSpinner := spinner.Model{Spinner: spinner.Dot}
    69	        m := Model{
    70	                keys:        keys.Keys,
    71	                sidebar:     sidebar.NewModel(),
    72	                taskSpinner: taskSpinner,
    73	                tasks:       map[string]context.Task{},
    74	        }
    75	
    76	        version := "dev"
    77	        if info, ok := debug.ReadBuildInfo(); ok && info.Main.Sum != "" {
    78	                version = info.Main.Version
    79	        }
    80	
    81	        m.ctx = &context.ProgramContext{
    82	                RepoPath:   location.RepoPath,
    83	                ConfigFlag: location.ConfigFlag,
    84	                Version:    version,
    85	                StartTask: func(task context.Task) tea.Cmd {
    86	                        log.Info("Starting task", "id", task.Id)
    87	                        task.StartTime = time.Now()
    88	                        m.tasks[task.Id] = task
    89	                        return m.taskSpinner.Tick
    90	                },
    91	                Theme: *theme.DefaultTheme,
    92	        }
    93	
    94	        m.footer = footer.NewModel(m.ctx)
    95	        m.prView = prview.NewModel(m.ctx)
    96	        m.issueSidebar = issueview.NewModel(m.ctx)
    97	        m.branchSidebar = branchsidebar.NewModel(m.ctx)
    98	        m.notificationView = notificationview.NewModel(m.ctx)
    99	        m.tabs = tabs.NewModel(m.ctx)
   100	
   101	        return m
   102	}
   103	
   104	func (m *Model) initScreen() tea.Msg {
   105	        showError := func(err error) {
   106	                styles := log.DefaultStyles()
   107	                styles.Key = lipgloss.NewStyle().
   108	                        Foreground(lipgloss.Color("1")).
   109	                        Bold(true)
   110	                styles.Separator = lipgloss.NewStyle()
   111	
   112	                logger := log.New(os.Stderr)
   113	                logger.SetStyles(styles)
   114	                logger.SetTimeFormat(time.RFC3339)
   115	                logger.SetReportTimestamp(true)
   116	                logger.SetPrefix("Reading config file")
   117	                logger.SetReportCaller(true)
   118	
   119	                logger.
   120	                        Fatal(
   121	                                "failed parsing config file",
   122	                                "location",
   123	                                m.ctx.ConfigFlag,
   124	                                "err",
   125	                                err,
   126	                        )
   127	        }
   128	
   129	        cfg, err := config.ParseConfig(
   130	                config.Location{RepoPath: m.ctx.RepoPath, ConfigFlag: m.ctx.ConfigFlag},
   131	        )
   132	        if err != nil {
   133	                showError(err)
   134	                return initMsg{Config: cfg}
   135	        }
   136	
   137	        var url string
   138	        if config.IsFeatureEnabled(config.FF_REPO_VIEW) && m.ctx.RepoPath != "" {
   139	                res, err := git.GetOriginUrl(m.ctx.RepoPath)
   140	                if err != nil {
   141	                        showError(err)
   142	                        return initMsg{Config: cfg}
   143	                }
   144	                url = res
   145	        }
   146	
   147	        err = keys.Rebind(
   148	                cfg.Keybindings.Universal,
   149	                cfg.Keybindings.Issues,
   150	                cfg.Keybindings.Prs,
   151	                cfg.Keybindings.Branches,
   152	                cfg.Keybindings.Notifications,
   153	        )
   154	        if err != nil {
   155	                showError(err)
   156	        }
   157	
   158	        return initMsg{Config: cfg, RepoUrl: url}
   159	}
   160	
   161	func (m Model) Init() tea.Cmd {
   162	        return tea.Batch(tea.RequestBackgroundColor, m.initScreen)
   163	}
   164	
   165	func (m Model) Update(msg tea.Msg) (tea.Model, tea.Cmd) {
   166	        var (
   167	                cmd             tea.Cmd
   168	                tabsCmd         tea.Cmd
   169	                sidebarCmd      tea.Cmd
   170	                prViewCmd       tea.Cmd
   171	                issueSidebarCmd tea.Cmd
   172	                footerCmd       tea.Cmd
   173	                cmds            []tea.Cmd
   174	                currSection     = m.getCurrSection()
   175	                currRowData     = m.getCurrRowData()
   176	        )
   177	
   178	        switch msg := msg.(type) {
   179	        case tea.KeyMsg:
   180	                log.Info("Key pressed", "key", msg.String())
   181	                m.ctx.Error = nil
   182	
   183	                if currSection != nil && (currSection.IsSearchFocused() ||
   184	                        currSection.IsPromptConfirmationFocused()) {
   185	                        cmd = m.updateSection(currSection.GetId(), currSection.GetType(), msg)
   186	                        return m, cmd
   187	                }
   188	
   189	                if m.prView.IsTextInputBoxFocused() {
   190	                        m.prView, cmd = m.prView.Update(msg)
   191	                        m.syncSidebar()
   192	                        return m, cmd
   193	                }
   194	
   195	                if m.issueSidebar.IsTextInputBoxFocused() {
   196	                        m.issueSidebar, cmd, _ = m.issueSidebar.Update(msg)
   197	                        m.syncSidebar()
   198	                        return m, cmd
   199	                }
   200	
   201	                if m.footer.ShowConfirmQuit && (msg.String() == "y" || msg.String() == "enter") {
   202	                        return m, tea.Quit
   203	                } else if m.footer.ShowConfirmQuit {
   204	                        m.footer.SetShowConfirmQuit(false)
   205	                        return m, nil
   206	                }
   207	
   208	                // Handle notification PR/Issue action confirmation
   209	                if m.notificationView.HasPendingAction() {
   210	                        var action string
   211	                        m.notificationView, action = m.notificationView.Update(msg)
   212	                        m.footer.SetLeftSection("")
   213	                        if action != "" {
   214	                                return m, m.executeNotificationAction(action)
   215	                        }
   216	                        return m, nil
   217	                }
   218	
   219	                switch {
   220	                case m.isUserDefinedKeybinding(msg):
   221	                        cmd = m.executeKeybinding(msg.String())
   222	                        return m, cmd
   223	
   224	                case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.PrevSection):
   225	                        prevSection := m.getSectionAt(m.getPrevSectionId())
   226	                        if prevSection != nil {
   227	                                m.setCurrSectionId(prevSection.GetId())
   228	                                cmd = m.onViewedRowChanged()
   229	                        }
   230	
   231	                case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.NextSection):
   232	                        nextSectionId := m.getNextSectionId()
   233	                        nextSection := m.getSectionAt(nextSectionId)
   234	                        if nextSection != nil {
   235	                                m.setCurrSectionId(nextSection.GetId())
   236	                                cmd = m.onViewedRowChanged()
   237	                        }
   238	
   239	                case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.Down):
   240	                        prevRow := currSection.CurrRow()
   241	                        nextRow := currSection.NextRow()
   242	                        if prevRow != nextRow && nextRow == currSection.NumRows()-1 &&
   243	                                m.ctx.View != config.RepoView {
   244	                                cmds = append(cmds, currSection.FetchNextPageSectionRows()...)
   245	                        }
   246	                        cmd = m.onViewedRowChanged()
   247	
   248	                case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.Up):
   249	                        currSection.PrevRow()
   250	                        cmd = m.onViewedRowChanged()
   251	
   252	                case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.FirstLine):
   253	                        currSection.FirstItem()
   254	                        cmd = m.onViewedRowChanged()
   255	
   256	                case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.LastLine):
   257	                        if currSection.CurrRow()+1 < currSection.NumRows() {
   258	                                cmds = append(cmds, currSection.FetchNextPageSectionRows()...)
   259	                        }
   260	                        currSection.LastItem()
   261	                        cmd = m.onViewedRowChanged()
   262	
   263	                case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.TogglePreview):
   264	                        m.sidebar.IsOpen = !m.sidebar.IsOpen
   265	                        m.syncMainContentWidth()
   266	
   267	                case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.Refresh):
   268	                        data.ClearEnrichmentCache()
   269	                        currSection.ResetFilters()
   270	                        currSection.ResetRows()
   271	                        m.syncSidebar()
   272	                        currSection.SetIsLoading(true)
   273	                        cmds = append(cmds, currSection.FetchNextPageSectionRows()...)
   274	
   275	                case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.RefreshAll):
   276	                        data.ClearEnrichmentCache()
   277	                        newSections, fetchSectionsCmds := m.fetchAllViewSections()
   278	                        m.setCurrentViewSections(newSections)
   279	                        cmds = append(cmds, fetchSectionsCmds)
   280	
   281	                case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.Redraw):
   282	                // TODO: this doesn't exist in bubbletea v2
   283	                // can't find a way to just ask to send bubbletea's internal repaintMsg{},
   284	                // so this seems like the lightest-weight alternative
   285	                // return m, tea.Batch(tea.ExitAltScreen, tea.EnterAltScreen)
   286	
   287	                case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.Search):
   288	                        if currSection != nil {
   289	                                cmd = currSection.SetIsSearching(true)
   290	                                return m, cmd
   291	                        }
   292	
   293	                case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.Help):
   294	                        if !m.footer.ShowAll {
   295	                                m.ctx.MainContentHeight = m.ctx.MainContentHeight +
   296	                                        common.FooterHeight - common.ExpandedHelpHeight
   297	                        } else {
   298	                                m.ctx.MainContentHeight = m.ctx.MainContentHeight +
   299	                                        common.ExpandedHelpHeight - common.FooterHeight
   300	                        }
   301	                        m.footer.ShowAll = !m.footer.ShowAll
   302	
   303	                case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.CopyNumber):
   304	                        var cmd tea.Cmd
   305	                        if currRowData == nil || reflect.ValueOf(currRowData).IsNil() {
   306	                                cmd = m.notifyErr("Current selection isn't associated with a PR/Issue")
   307	                                return m, cmd
   308	                        }
   309	                        number := fmt.Sprint(currRowData.GetNumber())
   310	                        err := clipboard.WriteAll(number)
   311	                        if err != nil {
   312	                                cmd = m.notifyErr(fmt.Sprintf("Failed copying to clipboard %v", err))
   313	                        } else {
   314	                                cmd = m.notify(fmt.Sprintf("Copied %s to clipboard", number))
   315	                        }
   316	                        return m, cmd
   317	
   318	                case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.CopyUrl):
   319	                        var cmd tea.Cmd
   320	                        if currRowData == nil || reflect.ValueOf(currRowData).IsNil() {
   321	                                cmd = m.notifyErr("Current selection isn't associated with a PR/Issue")
   322	                                return m, cmd
   323	                        }
   324	                        url := currRowData.GetUrl()
   325	                        err := clipboard.WriteAll(url)
   326	                        if err != nil {
   327	                                cmd = m.notifyErr(fmt.Sprintf("Failed copying to clipboard %v", err))
   328	                        } else {
   329	                                cmd = m.notify(fmt.Sprintf("Copied %s to clipboard", url))
   330	                        }
   331	                        return m, cmd
   332	
   333	                case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.Quit):
   334	                        if !m.ctx.Config.ConfirmQuit {
   335	                                return m, tea.Quit
   336	                        }
   337	
   338	                        m.footer.SetShowConfirmQuit(true)
   339	
   340	                case m.ctx.View == config.RepoView:
   341	                        switch {
   342	                        case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.OpenGithub):
   343	                                cmds = append(cmds, m.repo.(*reposection.Model).OpenGithub())
   344	
   345	                        case key.Matches(msg, keys.BranchKeys.Delete):
   346	                                if currSection != nil {
   347	                                        currSection.SetPromptConfirmationAction("delete")
   348	                                        cmd = currSection.SetIsPromptConfirmationShown(true)
   349	                                }
   350	                                return m, cmd
   351	
   352	                        case key.Matches(msg, keys.BranchKeys.New):
   353	                                if currSection != nil {
   354	                                        currSection.SetPromptConfirmationAction("new")
   355	                                        cmd = currSection.SetIsPromptConfirmationShown(true)
   356	                                }
   357	                                return m, cmd
   358	
   359	                        case key.Matches(msg, keys.BranchKeys.CreatePr):
   360	                                if currSection != nil {
   361	                                        currSection.SetPromptConfirmationAction("create_pr")
   362	                                        cmd = currSection.SetIsPromptConfirmationShown(true)
   363	                                }
   364	                                return m, cmd
   365	
   366	                        case key.Matches(msg, keys.BranchKeys.ViewPRs):
   367	                                cmds = append(cmds, m.switchSelectedView())
   368	                        }
   369	                case m.ctx.View == config.PRsView:
   370	                        switch {
   371	                        case key.Matches(msg, keys.PRKeys.PrevSidebarTab),
   372	                                key.Matches(msg, keys.PRKeys.NextSidebarTab):
   373	                                var scmds []tea.Cmd
   374	                                var scmd tea.Cmd
   375	                                m.prView, scmd = m.prView.Update(msg)
   376	                                scmds = append(scmds, scmd)
   377	                                m.syncSidebar()
   378	                                return m, tea.Batch(scmds...)
   379	
   380	                        case key.Matches(msg, m.keys.OpenGithub):
   381	                                cmds = append(cmds, m.openBrowser())
   382	
   383	                        case key.Matches(msg, keys.PRKeys.Approve):
   384	                                return m, m.openSidebarForPRInput(m.prView.SetIsApproving)
   385	
   386	                        case key.Matches(msg, keys.PRKeys.Assign):
   387	                                return m, m.openSidebarForPRInput(m.prView.SetIsAssigning)
   388	
   389	                        case key.Matches(msg, keys.PRKeys.Unassign):
   390	                                return m, m.openSidebarForPRInput(m.prView.SetIsUnassigning)
   391	
   392	                        case key.Matches(msg, keys.PRKeys.Label):

   397

   402	                                return m, cmd
   403	
   404	                        case key.Matches(msg, keys.PRKeys.Ready):

This is very interesting! After the main switch (after line 802), there's code at lines 813-822 that does:

```go
if m.prView.IsTextInputBoxFocused() {
    m.prView, prViewCmd = m.prView.Update(msg)
    m.syncSidebar()
}

if m.issueSidebar.IsTextInputBoxFocused() {
    m.issueSidebar, issueSidebarCmd, _ = m.issueSidebar.Update(msg)
    m.syncSidebar()
}
```

This code runs for ALL messages that fall through the main switch. So `tea.PasteMsg` would actually reach this code and be passed to `prView.Update` and `issueSidebar.Update`!

But wait, looking more carefully at lines 189-198 (inside the `tea.KeyMsg` block):

```go
if m.prView.IsTextInputBoxFocused() {
    m.prView, cmd = m.prView.Update(msg)
    ...
    return m, cmd
}

if m.issueSidebar.IsTextInputBoxFocused() {
    m.issueSidebar, cmd, _ = m.issueSidebar.Update(msg)
    ...
    return m, cmd
}
```

These early returns mean that when a KeyMsg comes and the input box is focused, the message is routed to the prView/issueSidebar and returned immediately. But for paste messages, these early returns aren't triggered because paste messages don't match `tea.KeyMsg`.

However, the later code at lines 813-822 does the same thing for ALL remaining messages! So `tea.PasteMsg` should reach `prView.Update` / `issueSidebar.Update` through that path.

Let me trace the full flow for paste:

1. `tea.PasteMsg` arrives in main Update
2. Does NOT match `case tea.KeyMsg:` (line 179)
3. Falls through all other cases in the main switch
4. Reaches line 813: `if m.prView.IsTextInputBoxFocused() { m.prView, prViewCmd = m.prView.Update(msg) ... }`
5. `prView.Update` is called with `tea.PasteMsg`
6. In `prView.Update` (line 59-60): `editor, cmd, submit, handled := m.editor.Update(msg)`
7. `editor.Update` (controller.Update) is called with `tea.PasteMsg`
8. In controller.Update, it doesn't match any case in the main switch at lines 203-319 (KeyMsg, RepoLabelsFetchedMsg, etc.)
9. Falls through to the final switch at lines 322+
10. With my fix, it now matches `case tea.PasteMsg:` and forwards to inputbox ✅

So my fix to controller.go should work! The paste message reaches the controller through the fallback path in ui.go (lines 813-822), and then my new `case tea.PasteMsg:` handles it.

But wait - I should also check if there could be a double-update issue. The code at lines 813-822 updates both `prView` and `issueSidebar` unconditionally (if their input boxes are focused). This means for non-KeyMsg messages, both could potentially try to update. But since only one should be focused at a time, this should be fine.

Let me verify my understanding by checking if the `prView.Update` method at line 59 calls `editor.Update` which now handles paste:

Looking at prview.go line 59:
```go
func (m Model) Update(msg tea.Msg) (Model, tea.Cmd) {
    editor, cmd, submit, handled := m.editor.Update(msg)
    ...
}
```

Yes, it calls `m.editor.Update(msg)` which is the controller's Update. And with my fix, the controller now handles `tea.PasteMsg`.

    20	type Mode int

    47	type RepoRef struct {

    62	        HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty bool

    86	type Controller struct {

   100	
   101	func New(ctx *context.ProgramContext) Controller {
   102	        inputBox := inputbox.NewModel(ctx)
   103	        ac := popupautocomplete.NewModel(ctx)
   104	        inputBox.SetAutocomplete(&ac)
   105	
   106	        return Controller{
   107	                ctx:      ctx,
   108	                inputBox: inputBox,
   109	                ac:       &ac,
   110	        }
   111	}
   112	
   113	func (c Controller) Mode() Mode {
   114	        return c.mode
   115	}
   116	
   117	func (c Controller) Active() bool {
   118	        return c.mode != ModeNone
   119	}
   120	
   121	func (c Controller) View() string {
   122	        if !c.Active() {
   123	                return ""
   124	        }
   125	
   126	        switch c.mode {
   127	        case ModeComment, ModeApprove, ModeAssign, ModeLabel:
   128	                return c.inputBox.ViewWithAutocomplete()
   129	        default:
   130	                return c.inputBox.View()
   131	        }
   132	}
   133	
   134	func (c *Controller) SetWidth(width int) {
   135	        c.inputBox.SetWidth(width)
   136	        c.ac.SetWidth(width - 4)
   137	}
   138	
   139	func (c *Controller) UpdateProgramContext(ctx *context.ProgramContext) {
   140	        c.ctx = ctx
   141	        c.inputBox.UpdateProgramContext(ctx)
   142	        c.ac.UpdateProgramContext(ctx)
   143	}
   144	
   145	func (c Controller) Exit() Controller {
   146	        c.inputBox.Blur()
   147	        c.resetAutocompleteState()
   148	        c.mode = ModeNone
   149	        c.prompt = ""
   150	        c.repo = RepoRef{}
   151	        c.suggestionKind = SuggestionNone
   152	        c.confirmDiscard = false
   153	        c.showConfirmCancel = false
   154	        c.hideOnEmpty = false
   155	        return c
   156	}
   157	
   158	func (c Controller) Enter(opts EnterOptions) (Controller, tea.Cmd) {
   159	        c.inputBox.Reset()
   160	        c.resetAutocompleteState()
   161	        c.mode = opts.Mode
   162	        c.prompt = opts.Prompt
   163	        c.repo = opts.Repo
   164	        c.suggestionKind = opts.SuggestionKind
   165	        c.confirmDiscard = opts.ConfirmDiscardOnCancel
   166	        c.showConfirmCancel = false
   167	        c.hideOnEmpty = opts.HideAutocompleteWhenContextEmpty
   168	
   169	        c.inputBox.SetPrompt(opts.Prompt)
   170	        c.inputBox.SetAutocompleteSource(opts.Source)
   171	        c.inputBox.SetValue(opts.InitialValue)
   172	
   173	        cmds := []tea.Cmd{textarea.Blink, c.inputBox.Focus()}
   174	
   175	        switch opts.SuggestionKind {
   176	        case SuggestionUsers:
   177	                if users, ok := data.CachedRepoUsers(opts.Repo.NameWithOwner); ok {
   178	                        c.repoUsers = users
   179	                        c.ac.SetSuggestions(userSuggestions(users))
   180	                        c.showSuggestionsFromCurrentContext()
   181	                } else if opts.EnterFetch != FetchNone {
   182	                        cmds = append([]tea.Cmd{c.fetchUsers(opts.EnterFetch == FetchWithLoading)}, cmds...)
   183	                }
   184	        case SuggestionLabels:
   185	                if labels, ok := data.CachedRepoLabels(opts.Repo.NameWithOwner); ok {
   186	                        c.repoLabels = labels
   187	                        c.ac.SetSuggestions(labelSuggestions(labels))
   188	                        c.showSuggestionsFromCurrentContext()
   189	                } else if opts.EnterFetch != FetchNone {
   190	                        cmds = append([]tea.Cmd{c.fetchLabels(opts.EnterFetch == FetchWithLoading)}, cmds...)
   191	                }
   192	        }
   193	
   194	        return c, tea.Sequence(cmds...)
   195	}
   196	
   197	func (c Controller) Update(msg tea.Msg) (Controller, tea.Cmd, *Submit, bool) {
   198	        var (
   199	                cmds  []tea.Cmd
   200	                taCmd tea.Cmd
   201	        )
   202	
   203	        switch msg := msg.(type) {
   204	        case RepoLabelsFetchedMsg:
   205	                c.repoLabels = msg.Labels
   206	                c.ac.SetSuggestions(labelSuggestions(msg.Labels))
   207	                cmds = append(cmds, c.ac.SetFetchSuccess())
   208	                if c.mode == ModeLabel {
   209	                        c.showSuggestionsFromCurrentContext()
   210	                }
   211	                return c, tea.Batch(cmds...), nil, true
   212	
   213	        case RepoLabelsFetchFailedMsg:
   214	                return c, c.ac.SetFetchError(msg.Err), nil, true
   215	
   216	        case RepoUsersFetchedMsg:
   217	                c.repoUsers = msg.Users
   218	                c.ac.SetSuggestions(userSuggestions(msg.Users))
   219	                cmds = append(cmds, c.ac.SetFetchSuccess())
   220	                if c.mode == ModeComment || c.mode == ModeApprove || c.mode == ModeAssign {
   221	                        c.showSuggestionsFromCurrentContext()
   222	                }
   223	                return c, tea.Batch(cmds...), nil, true
   224	
   225	        case RepoUsersFetchFailedMsg:
   226	                return c, c.ac.SetFetchError(msg.Err), nil, true
   227	
   228	        case popupautocomplete.FetchSuggestionsRequestedMsg:
   229	                if !c.Active() || c.suggestionKind == SuggestionNone {
   230	                        return c, nil, nil, false
   231	                }
   232	                if msg.Force {
   233	                        c.clearRelevantCache()
   234	                }
   235	                switch c.suggestionKind {
   236	                case SuggestionUsers:
   237	                        return c, c.fetchUsers(true), nil, true
   238	                case SuggestionLabels:
   239	                        return c, c.fetchLabels(true), nil, true
   240	                default:
   241	                        return c, nil, nil, false
   242	                }
   243	
   244	        case tea.KeyMsg:
   245	                if !c.Active() {
   246	                        return c, nil, nil, false
   247	                }
   248	
   249	                switch {
   250	                case key.Matches(msg, popupautocomplete.RefreshSuggestionsKey):
   251	                        if c.suggestionKind == SuggestionNone {
   252	                                return c, nil, nil, true
   253	                        }
   254	                        c.clearRelevantCache()
   255	                        switch c.suggestionKind {
   256	                        case SuggestionUsers:
   257	                                return c, c.fetchUsers(true), nil, true
   258	                        case SuggestionLabels:
   259	                                return c, c.fetchLabels(true), nil, true
   260	                        }
   261	                }
   262	
   263	                switch msg.String() {
   264	                case "ctrl+d":
   265	                        value := c.inputBox.Value()
   266	                        mode := c.mode
   267	                        c = c.Exit()
   268	                        return c, nil, &Submit{Mode: mode, Value: value}, true
   269	
   270	                case "esc", "ctrl+c":
   271	                        if c.confirmDiscard {
   272	                                if !c.showConfirmCancel {
   273	                                        c.setDiscardPrompt()
   274	                                        return c, nil, nil, true
   275	                                }
   276	                                c = c.Exit()
   277	                                return c, nil, nil, true
   278	                        }
   279	                        c = c.Exit()
   280	                        return c, nil, nil, true
   281	
   282	                default:
   283	                        if c.confirmDiscard {
   284	                                if msg.String() == "Y" || msg.String() == "y" {
   285	                                        if c.showConfirmCancel {
   286	                                                c = c.Exit()
   287	                                                return c, nil, nil, true
   288	                                        }
   289	                                }
   290	                                if c.showConfirmCancel && (msg.String() == "N" || msg.String() == "n") {
   291	                                        c.restorePrompt()
   292	                                        return c, nil, nil, true
   293	                                }
   294	                                if c.showConfirmCancel {
   295	                                        c.restorePrompt()
   296	                                }
   297	                        }
   298	                }
   299	
   300	                var previousContext dataautocomplete.Context
   301	                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
   302	                        previousContext = c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
   303	                }
   304	
   305	                c.inputBox, taCmd = c.inputBox.Update(msg)
   306	                cmds = append(cmds, taCmd)
   307	
   308	                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
   309	                        currentContext := c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
   310	                        if currentContext != previousContext {
   311	                                if c.hideOnEmpty && currentContext == (dataautocomplete.Context{}) {
   312	                                        c.ac.Hide()
   313	                                } else {
   314	                                        c.ac.Show(currentContext.Content, c.inputBox.AutocompleteItemsToExclude())
   315	                                }
   316	                        }
   317	                }
   318	
   319	                return c, tea.Batch(cmds...), nil, true
   320	        }
   321	
   322	        switch msg := msg.(type) {
   323	        case spinner.TickMsg, popupautocomplete.ClearFetchStatusMsg:
   324	                var acCmd tea.Cmd
   325	                *c.ac, acCmd = c.ac.Update(msg)
   326	                return c, acCmd, nil, c.Active() || c.suggestionKind != SuggestionNone
   327	        case tea.PasteMsg:
   328	                if !c.Active() {
   329	                        return c, nil, nil, false
   330	                }
   331	
   332	                var previousContext dataautocomplete.Context
   333	                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
   334	                        previousContext = c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
   335	                }
   336	
   337	                c.inputBox, _ = c.inputBox.Update(msg)
   338	
   339	                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
   340	                        currentContext := c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
   341	                        if currentContext != previousContext {
   342	                                if c.hideOnEmpty && currentContext == (dataautocomplete.Context{}) {
   343	                                        c.ac.Hide()
   344	                                } else {
   345	                                        c.ac.Show(currentContext.Content, c.inputBox.AutocompleteItemsToExclude())
   346	                                }
   347	                        }
   348	                }
   349	                return c, nil, nil, true
   350	        }
   351	
   352	        return c, nil, nil, false
   353	}
   354	
   355	func (c *Controller) clearRelevantCache() {
   356	        switch c.suggestionKind {
   357	        case SuggestionUsers:
   358	                if c.repo.NameWithOwner != "" {
   359	                        data.ClearRepoUserCache(c.repo.NameWithOwner)
   360	                }
   361	        case SuggestionLabels:
   362	                if c.repo.NameWithOwner != "" {
   363	                        data.ClearRepoLabelCache(c.repo.NameWithOwner)
   364	                }
   365	        }
   366	}
   367	
   368	func (c *Controller) restorePrompt() {
   369	        c.inputBox.SetPrompt(c.prompt)
   370	        c.showConfirmCancel = false
   371	}
   372	
   373	func (c *Controller) setDiscardPrompt() {
   374	        c.inputBox.SetPrompt(
   375	                lipgloss.NewStyle().Foreground(c.ctx.Theme.ErrorText).Render("Discard comment? (y/N)"),
   376	        )
   377	        c.showConfirmCancel = true
   378	}
   379	
   380	func (c *Controller) resetAutocompleteState() {
   381	        c.ac.Reset()
   382	        c.ac.Hide()
   383	        c.ac.SetSuggestions(nil)
   384	}
   385	
   386	func (c Controller) showSuggestionsFromCurrentContext() {
   387	        if !c.usesAutocomplete() {
   388	                return
   389	        }
   390	        currentContext := c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
   391	        if c.hideOnEmpty && currentContext == (dataautocomplete.Context{}) {
   392	                c.ac.Hide()
   393	                return
   394	        }
   395	        c.ac.Show(currentContext.Content, c.inputBox.AutocompleteItemsToExclude())
   396	}
   397	
   398	func (c Controller) usesAutocomplete() bool {
   399	        switch c.mode {
   400	        case ModeComment, ModeApprove, ModeAssign, ModeLabel:
   401	                return true
   402	        default:
   403	                return false
   404	        }
   405	}
   406	
   407	func (c Controller) fetchLabels(showLoading bool) tea.Cmd {
   408	        var spinnerTickCmd tea.Cmd
   409	        if showLoading {
   410	                spinnerTickCmd = c.ac.SetFetchLoading()
   411	        }
   412	
   413	        fetchCmd := func() tea.Msg {
   414	                labels, err := data.FetchRepoLabels(c.repo.NameWithOwner)
   415	                if err != nil {
   416	                        return RepoLabelsFetchFailedMsg{Err: err}
   417	                }
   418	                return RepoLabelsFetchedMsg{Labels: labels}
   419	        }
   420	
   421	        if spinnerTickCmd != nil {
   422	                return tea.Batch(spinnerTickCmd, fetchCmd)
   423	        }
   424	        return fetchCmd
   425	}
   426	
   427	func (c Controller) fetchUsers(showLoading bool) tea.Cmd {
   428	        var spinnerTickCmd tea.Cmd
   429	        if showLoading {
   430	                spinnerTickCmd = c.ac.SetFetchLoading()
   431	        }
   432	
   433	        fetchCmd := func() tea.Msg {
   434	                users, err := data.FetchRepoUsers(c.repo.Owner, c.repo.Name)
   435	                if err != nil {
   436	                        return RepoUsersFetchFailedMsg{Err: err}
   437	                }
   438	                return RepoUsersFetchedMsg{Users: users}
   439	        }
   440	
   441	        if spinnerTickCmd != nil {
   442	                return tea.Batch(spinnerTickCmd, fetchCmd)
   443	        }
   444	        return fetchCmd
   445	}
   446	
   447	func userSuggestions(users []data.User) []popupautocomplete.Suggestion {
   448	        suggestions := make([]popupautocomplete.Suggestion, 0, len(users))
   449	        for _, user := range users {
   450	                suggestions = append(suggestions, popupautocomplete.Suggestion{
   451	                        Value:  user.Login,
   452	                        Detail: strings.TrimSpace(user.Name),
   453	                })
   454	        }
   455	        return suggestions
   456	}
   457	
   458	func labelSuggestions(labels []data.Label) []popupautocomplete.Suggestion {
   459	        suggestions := make([]popupautocomplete.Suggestion, 0, len(labels))
   460	        for _, label := range labels {
   461	                suggestions = append(suggestions, popupautocomplete.Suggestion{
   462	                        Value:  label.Name,
   463	                        Detail: strings.TrimSpace(label.Description),
   464	                })
   465	        }
   466	        return suggestions
   467	}
   468	




2026-05-29 20:09:59,382 - INFO - swea-agent-dlvhdr__gh-dash-813 - ========================= STEP 44 =========================
2026-05-29 20:09:59,390 - DEBUG - swea-lm-dlvhdr__gh-dash-813 - n_cache_control: 2
2026-05-29 20:10:04,792 - DEBUG - swea-lm-dlvhdr__gh-dash-813 - Response: ModelResponse(id='6b595360c6d64517bb7bc3af06809f45', created=1780085401, model='DeepSeek-V4-Pro', object='chat.completion', system_fingerprint=None, choices=[Choices(finish_reason='stop', index=0, message=Message(content="The fix looks good. Let me summarize what was changed:\n\n## Summary\n\nThe bug was that pasting text into the comment input box (in both `prview` and `issueview`) no longer worked.\n\n### Root Cause\n\nIn Bubble Tea v2, `tea.PasteMsg` is a separate message type (not a `tea.KeyMsg`). The `detailedit.Controller.Update` method handles messages in two main blocks:\n\n1. A switch at line 203 that handles specific message types (`RepoLabelsFetchedMsg`, `RepoLabelsFetchFailedMsg`, `RepoUsersFetchedMsg`, `RepoUsersFetchFailedMsg`, `popupautocomplete.FetchSuggestionsRequestedMsg`, and `tea.KeyMsg`)\n\n2. A fallback switch at line 322 that only handled `spinner.TickMsg` and `popupautocomplete.ClearFetchStatusMsg`\n\n`tea.PasteMsg` didn't match any of these cases and fell through to `return c, nil, nil, false`, meaning it was never forwarded to the underlying input box / textarea component.\n\n### Fix\n\nAdded a `case tea.PasteMsg:` in the fallback switch (line 327-349) that:\n1. Checks if the controller is active (in an editing mode)\n2. If active, forwards the paste message to the input box (which forwards it to the textarea)\n3. +                c.repoUsers = msg.Users
+                c.ac.SetSuggestions(userSuggestions(msg.Users))
+                cmds = append(cmds, c.ac.SetFetchSuccess())
+                if c.mode == ModeComment || c.mode == ModeApprove || c.mode == ModeAssign {
+                        c.showSuggestionsFromCurrentContext()

+
+        case RepoUsersFetchFailedMsg:
+                return c, c.ac.SetFetchError(msg.Err), nil, true
+
+        case popupautocomplete.FetchSuggestionsRequestedMsg:
+                if !c.Active() || c.suggestionKind == SuggestionNone {
+                        return c, nil, nil, false
+                }
+                if msg.Force {
+                        c.clearRelevantCache()
+                }
+                switch c.suggestionKind {
+                case SuggestionUsers:
+                        return c, c.fetchUsers(true), nil, true
+                case SuggestionLabels:
+                        return c, c.fetchLabels(true), nil, true
+                default:
+                        return c, nil, nil, false
+                }
+
+        case tea.KeyMsg:
+                if !c.Active() {
+                        return c, nil, nil, false
+                }
+
+                switch {
+                case key.Matches(msg, popupautocomplete.RefreshSuggestionsKey):
+                        if c.suggestionKind == SuggestionNone {
+                                return c, nil, nil, true
+                        }
+                        c.clearRelevantCache()
+                        switch c.suggestionKind {
+                        case SuggestionUsers:
+                                return c, c.fetchUsers(true), nil, true
+                        case SuggestionLabels:
+                                return c, c.fetchLabels(true), nil, true
+                        }
+                }
+
+                switch msg.String() {
+                case "ctrl+d":
+                        value := c.inputBox.Value()
+                        mode := c.mode
+                        c = c.Exit()

+
+                case "esc", "ctrl+c":
+                        if c.confirmDiscard {
+                                if !c.showConfirmCancel {
+                                        c.setDiscardPrompt()
+                                        return c, nil, nil, true
+                                }
+                                c = c.Exit()
+                                return c, nil, nil, true
+                        }
+                        c = c.Exit()
+                        return c, nil, nil, true
+
+                default:
+                        if c.confirmDiscard {
+                                if msg.String() == "Y" || msg.String() == "y" {
+                                        if c.showConfirmCancel {
+                                                c = c.Exit()
+                                                return c, nil, nil, true
+                                        }
+                                }
+                                if c.showConfirmCancel && (msg.String() == "N" || msg.String() == "n") {
+                                        c.restorePrompt()
+                                        return c, nil, nil, true
+                                }
+                                if c.showConfirmCancel {
+                                        c.restorePrompt()
+                                }
+                        }
+                }
+
+                var previousContext dataautocomplete.Context
+                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
+                        previousContext = c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
+                }
+
+                c.inputBox, taCmd = c.inputBox.Update(msg)
+                cmds = append(cmds, taCmd)
+
+                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
+                        currentContext := c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
+                        if currentContext != previousContext {
+                                if c.hideOnEmpty && currentContext == (dataautocomplete.Context{}) {
+                                        c.ac.Hide()
+                                } else {
+                                        c.ac.Show(currentContext.Content, c.inputBox.AutocompleteItemsToExclude())
+                                }
+                        }
+                }
+
+                return c, tea.Batch(cmds...), nil, true
+        }
+
+        switch msg := msg.(type) {
+        case spinner.TickMsg, popupautocomplete.ClearFetchStatusMsg:

+        case tea.PasteMsg:
+                if !c.Active() {
+                        return c, nil, nil, false
+                }
+
+                var previousContext dataautocomplete.Context
+                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
+                        previousContext = c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
+                }
+
+                c.inputBox, _ = c.inputBox.Update(msg)
+
+                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
+                        currentContext := c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
+                        if currentContext != previousContext {
+                                if c.hideOnEmpty && currentContext == (dataautocomplete.Context{}) {
+                                        c.ac.Hide()
+                                } else {
+                                        c.ac.Show(currentContext.Content, c.inputBox.AutocompleteItemsToExclude())
+                                }
+                        }
+                }
+                return c, nil, nil, true
+        }
+
+        return c, nil, nil, false
 }

 }

+        cmds := []tea.Cmd{textarea.Blink, c.inputBox.Focus()}
+
+        switch opts.SuggestionKind {
+        case SuggestionUsers:
+                if users, ok := data.CachedRepoUsers(opts.Repo.NameWithOwner); ok {
+                        c.repoUsers = users
+                        c.ac.SetSuggestions(userSuggestions(users))
+                        c.showSuggestionsFromCurrentContext()
+                } else if opts.EnterFetch != FetchNone {
+                        cmds = append([]tea.Cmd{c.fetchUsers(opts.EnterFetch == FetchWithLoading)}, cmds...)
+                }
+        case SuggestionLabels:
+                if labels, ok := data.CachedRepoLabels(opts.Repo.NameWithOwner); ok {
+                        c.repoLabels = labels
+                        c.ac.SetSuggestions(labelSuggestions(labels))
+                        c.showSuggestionsFromCurrentContext()
+                } else if opts.EnterFetch != FetchNone {
+                        cmds = append([]tea.Cmd{c.fetchLabels(opts.EnterFetch == FetchWithLoading)}, cmds...)
+                }
+        }
+
+        return c, tea.Sequence(cmds...)
 }

+                        return c, c.fetchLabels(true), nil, true

+                if !c.Active() {
+                        return c, nil, nil, false
+                }
+
+                switch {
+                case key.Matches(msg, popupautocomplete.RefreshSuggestionsKey):
+                        if c.suggestionKind == SuggestionNone {
+                                return c, nil, nil, true
+                        }
+                        c.clearRelevantCache()
+                        switch c.suggestionKind {
+                        case SuggestionUsers:
+                                return c, c.fetchUsers(true), nil, true

+                                return c, c.fetchLabels(true), nil, true
+                        }
+                }
+

+                case "ctrl+d":
+                        value := c.inputBox.Value()
+                        mode := c.mode
+                        c = c.Exit()

+
+                case "esc", "ctrl+c":
+                        if c.confirmDiscard {
+                                if !c.showConfirmCancel {
+                                        c.setDiscardPrompt()
+                                        return c, nil, nil, true
+                                }
+                                c = c.Exit()
+                                return c, nil, nil, true
+                        }
+                        c = c.Exit()
+                        return c, nil, nil, true
+

+                                if msg.String() == "Y" || msg.String() == "y" {

+                                                c = c.Exit()
+                                                return c, nil, nil, true
+                                        }
+                                }
+                                if c.showConfirmCancel && (msg.String() == "N" || msg.String() == "n") {
+                                        c.restorePrompt()
+                                        return c, nil, nil, true
+                                }
+                                if c.showConfirmCancel {
+                                        c.restorePrompt()
+                                }
+                        }
+                }
+
+                var previousContext dataautocomplete.Context
+                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
+                        previousContext = c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()

+                cmds = append(cmds, taCmd)
+
+                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
+                        currentContext := c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
+                        if currentContext != previousContext {
+                                if c.hideOnEmpty && currentContext == (dataautocomplete.Context{}) {
+                                        c.ac.Hide()
+                                } else {
+                                        c.ac.Show(currentContext.Content, c.inputBox.AutocompleteItemsToExclude())
+                                }
+                        }
+                }
+
+                return c, tea.Batch(cmds...), nil, true

+        case spinner.TickMsg, popupautocomplete.ClearFetchStatusMsg:
+                var acCmd tea.Cmd
+                *c.ac, acCmd = c.ac.Update(msg)
+                return c, acCmd, nil, c.Active() || c.suggestionKind != SuggestionNone
+        case tea.PasteMsg:
+                if !c.Active() {
+                        return c, nil, nil, false
+                }

+                                } else {
+                                        c.ac.Show(currentContext.Content, c.inputBox.AutocompleteItemsToExclude())

+                c.repoUsers = msg.Users
+                c.ac.SetSuggestions(userSuggestions(msg.Users))
+                cmds = append(cmds, c.ac.SetFetchSuccess())
+                if c.mode == ModeComment || c.mode == ModeApprove || c.mode == ModeAssign {
+                        c.showSuggestionsFromCurrentContext()

+                return c, tea.Batch(cmds...), nil, true
+
+        case RepoUsersFetchFailedMsg:
+                return c, c.ac.SetFetchError(msg.Err), nil, true
+
+        case popupautocomplete.FetchSuggestionsRequestedMsg:
+                if !c.Active() || c.suggestionKind == SuggestionNone {
+                        return c, nil, nil, false
+                }
+                if msg.Force {
+                        c.clearRelevantCache()
+                }
+                switch c.suggestionKind {
+                case SuggestionUsers:
+                        return c, c.fetchUsers(true), nil, true
+                case SuggestionLabels:
+                        return c, c.fetchLabels(true), nil, true
+                default:
+                        return c, nil, nil, false
+                }
+
+        case tea.KeyMsg:
+                if !c.Active() {
+                        return c, nil, nil, false
+                }
+
+                switch {
+                case key.Matches(msg, popupautocomplete.RefreshSuggestionsKey):
+                        if c.suggestionKind == SuggestionNone {
+                                return c, nil, nil, true
+                        }
+                        c.clearRelevantCache()
+                        switch c.suggestionKind {
+                        case SuggestionUsers:
+                                return c, c.fetchUsers(true), nil, true
+                        case SuggestionLabels:
+                                return c, c.fetchLabels(true), nil, true
+                        }
+                }
+
+                switch msg.String() {
+                case "ctrl+d":
+                        value := c.inputBox.Value()
+                        mode := c.mode
+                        c = c.Exit()
+                        return c, nil, &Submit{Mode: mode, Value: value}, true
+
+                case "esc", "ctrl+c":
+                        if c.confirmDiscard {
+                                if !c.showConfirmCancel {
+                                        c.setDiscardPrompt()
+                                        return c, nil, nil, true
+                                }
+                                c = c.Exit()
+                                return c, nil, nil, true
+                        }
+                        c = c.Exit()
+                        return c, nil, nil, true
+
+                default:
+                        if c.confirmDiscard {
+                                if msg.String() == "Y" || msg.String() == "y" {
+                                        if c.showConfirmCancel {
+                                                c = c.Exit()
+                                                return c, nil, nil, true
+                                        }
+                                }
+                                if c.showConfirmCancel && (msg.String() == "N" || msg.String() == "n") {
+                                        c.restorePrompt()
+                                        return c, nil, nil, true
+                                }
+                                if c.showConfirmCancel {
+                                        c.restorePrompt()
+                                }
+                        }
+                }
+
+                var previousContext dataautocomplete.Context
+                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
+                        previousContext = c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
+                }
+
+                c.inputBox, taCmd = c.inputBox.Update(msg)
+                cmds = append(cmds, taCmd)
+
+                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
+                        currentContext := c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
+                        if currentContext != previousContext {
+                                if c.hideOnEmpty && currentContext == (dataautocomplete.Context{}) {
+                                        c.ac.Hide()
+                                } else {
+                                        c.ac.Show(currentContext.Content, c.inputBox.AutocompleteItemsToExclude())
+                                }
+                        }
+                }
+
+                return c, tea.Batch(cmds...), nil, true
+        }
+
+        switch msg := msg.(type) {
+        case spinner.TickMsg, popupautocomplete.ClearFetchStatusMsg:
+                var acCmd tea.Cmd
+                *c.ac, acCmd = c.ac.Update(msg)
+                return c, acCmd, nil, c.Active() || c.suggestionKind != SuggestionNone
+        case tea.PasteMsg:
+                if !c.Active() {
+                        return c, nil, nil, false
+                }
+
+                var previousContext dataautocomplete.Context
+                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
+                        previousContext = c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
+                }
+
+                c.inputBox, _ = c.inputBox.Update(msg)
+
+                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
+                        currentContext := c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
+                        if currentContext != previousContext {
+                                if c.hideOnEmpty && currentContext == (dataautocomplete.Context{}) {
+                                        c.ac.Hide()
+                                } else {
+                                        c.ac.Show(currentContext.Content, c.inputBox.AutocompleteItemsToExclude())
+                                }
+                        }
+                }
+                return c, nil, nil, true
+        }
+
+        return c, nil, nil, false
 }

+                }
+                return c, tea.Batch(cmds...), nil, true
+
+        case RepoLabelsFetchFailedMsg:
+                return c, c.ac.SetFetchError(msg.Err), nil, true
+
+        case RepoUsersFetchedMsg:
+                c.repoUsers = msg.Users
+                c.ac.SetSuggestions(userSuggestions(msg.Users))
+                cmds = append(cmds, c.ac.SetFetchSuccess())
+                if c.mode == ModeComment || c.mode == ModeApprove || c.mode == ModeAssign {
+                        c.showSuggestionsFromCurrentContext()
+                }
+                return c, tea.Batch(cmds...), nil, true
+
+        case RepoUsersFetchFailedMsg:
+                return c, c.ac.SetFetchError(msg.Err), nil, true
+
+        case popupautocomplete.FetchSuggestionsRequestedMsg:
+                if !c.Active() || c.suggestionKind == SuggestionNone {
+                        return c, nil, nil, false
+                }
+                if msg.Force {
+                        c.clearRelevantCache()
+                }
+                switch c.suggestionKind {
+                case SuggestionUsers:
+                        return c, c.fetchUsers(true), nil, true
+                case SuggestionLabels:
+                        return c, c.fetchLabels(true), nil, true
+                default:
+                        return c, nil, nil, false
+                }
+
+        case tea.KeyMsg:
+                if !c.Active() {
+                        return c, nil, nil, false
+                }
+
+                switch {
+                case key.Matches(msg, popupautocomplete.RefreshSuggestionsKey):
+                        if c.suggestionKind == SuggestionNone {
+                                return c, nil, nil, true
+                        }
+                        c.clearRelevantCache()
+                        switch c.suggestionKind {
+                        case SuggestionUsers:
+                                return c, c.fetchUsers(true), nil, true
+                        case SuggestionLabels:
+                                return c, c.fetchLabels(true), nil, true
+                        }
+                }
+
+                switch msg.String() {
+                case "ctrl+d":
+                        value := c.inputBox.Value()
+                        mode := c.mode
+                        c = c.Exit()
+                        return c, nil, &Submit{Mode: mode, Value: value}, true
+
+                case "esc", "ctrl+c":
+                        if c.confirmDiscard {
+                                if !c.showConfirmCancel {
+                                        c.setDiscardPrompt()
+                                        return c, nil, nil, true
+                                }
+                                c = c.Exit()
+                                return c, nil, nil, true
+                        }
+                        c = c.Exit()
+                        return c, nil, nil, true
+
+                default:
+                        if c.confirmDiscard {
+                                if msg.String() == "Y" || msg.String() == "y" {
+                                        if c.showConfirmCancel {
+                                                c = c.Exit()
+                                                return c, nil, nil, true
+                                        }
+                                }
+                                if c.showConfirmCancel && (msg.String() == "N" || msg.String() == "n") {
+                                        c.restorePrompt()
+                                        return c, nil, nil, true
+                                }
+                                if c.showConfirmCancel {
+                                        c.restorePrompt()
+                                }
+                        }
+                }
+
+                var previousContext dataautocomplete.Context
+                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
+                        previousContext = c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
+                }
+
+                c.inputBox, taCmd = c.inputBox.Update(msg)
+                cmds = append(cmds, taCmd)
+
+                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
+                        currentContext := c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
+                        if currentContext != previousContext {
+                                if c.hideOnEmpty && currentContext == (dataautocomplete.Context{}) {
+                                        c.ac.Hide()
+                                } else {
+                                        c.ac.Show(currentContext.Content, c.inputBox.AutocompleteItemsToExclude())
+                                }
+                        }
+                }
+
+                return c, tea.Batch(cmds...), nil, true
+        }
+
+        switch msg := msg.(type) {
+        case spinner.TickMsg, popupautocomplete.ClearFetchStatusMsg:
+                var acCmd tea.Cmd
+                *c.ac, acCmd = c.ac.Update(msg)
+                return c, acCmd, nil, c.Active() || c.suggestionKind != SuggestionNone
+        case tea.PasteMsg:
+                if !c.Active() {
+                        return c, nil, nil, false
+                }
+
+                var previousContext dataautocomplete.Context
+                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
+                        previousContext = c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
+                }
+
+                c.inputBox, _ = c.inputBox.Update(msg)
+
+                if c.usesAutocomplete() {
+                        currentContext := c.inputBox.CurrentAutocompleteContext()
+                        if currentContext != previousContext {
+                                if c.hideOnEmpty && currentContext == (dataautocomplete.Context{}) {
+                                        c.ac.Hide()
+                                } else {
+                                        c.ac.Show(currentContext.Content, c.inputBox.AutocompleteItemsToExclude())
+                                }
+                        }
+                }
+                return c, nil, nil, true
+        }
+
+        return c, nil, nil, false
 }
